prompt: I want to update our Express API from v4 to v5. What baseline evidence do I capture before the upgrade, and how do I prove the upgrade didn't break anything?
expected_output: Baseline before upgrade: Run all 6 API validation steps (health check, CRUD cycle, auth, error responses, pagination, rate limiting if applicable). Save every curl response to e2e-evidence/baseline/api-*. After upgrade: re-run the same 6 steps, save to e2e-evidence/api-after-upgrade/*. Compare: status codes, response structure, auth behavior. If all match, no regression. If any differ, investigate.
